articles.author: Laura Paddison
articles.title: ‘Mind-bogglingly crazy’: Europe’s deadly, early heatwave is smashing records - CNN
articles.description: Temperature records are being broken across Europe as parts of the continent swelter under a heat dome that is bringing extreme temperatures alarmingly early in the year.
articles.content:
Summary
  • A deadly and early heat wave is shattering May temperature records across Europe, as the continent swelters under a heat dome.
  • The UK recorded its hottest May day ever at 34.… [+4919 chars]
